issue.title: feat(user): Add user module domain repository and service
issue.body: User module including upsertUser, getUserById, and deleteUser. Synchronization with Clerk via webhooks.

issue.title: feat(auth): Add middleware for app and admin route protection
issue.body: Route protection for (app)/ and (admin)/. Verification of Clerk userId and admin role.

issue.title: test(user): Add unit tests for user module
issue.body: Scenarios: creation, update, and userId not found.
